version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v1.6 Removed redundant output meter calculation in @sample v1.5 Reduced window size: 700x828 -> 580x680 Smaller knobs and tighter spacing v1.4 New "standard" GUI Dim knob labels, amber value readouts White VU meters C/E/G mode selector with per-mode colors Centered Polarity and SAT ON switches Compressor knobs repositioned for better spacing

reapack.name: Tycho Delay TMA-1 - Tape Delay (AI Code).jsfx

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: # v2.0 + Complete GUI overhaul using citizenkeith-ui-lib + Sync on/off toggle — preserves last sync value when toggled off + Removed Off option from sync selector; dedicated SYNC button added + Red readout for active sync value + Fixed ui_setup memory overlap causing periodic clicks and GUI flashing + Cleaned up dead code from troubleshooting (delaylen, init flags, @block tempo tracking) # v1.0 + Initial release with cubic interpolation delay buffer + Catmull-Rom interpolation for smooth delay time changes + Ping pong stereo with crossfade + Delay loop lowpass filter and saturation + Tempo sync with 28 note values

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v2.1 Double-click to reset knobs, amber value readouts Sync selector integrated into Delay section v2.0 New "standard" GUI Sync on/off toggle with dedicated SYNC button Fixed ui_setup memory overlap causing periodic clicks v1.0 Initial release with Catmull-Rom interpolation delay buffer Ping pong stereo, tempo sync, tape saturation

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v1.1 New "standard" GUI Removed default REAPER slider UI Sidechain HPF raised to 150Hz for better bass control Level-dependent sensitivity taper replaces hard gate floor Automatic makeup gain baked into sensitivity scaling Pre-charge fix eliminates startup distortion spike v1.0 Initial release Upward compression with lookahead circular buffer Program-dependent three-tier release Soft limiter (x/1+|x|) output safety stage PDC reported to REAPER for phase alignment

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: Initial release - Port of igorski's Rechoir VST to JSFX

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v2.0 Slider labels changed to white for readability v1.1 Fixed pattern regeneration firing every block at step 0 (now uses flag) Fixed step_length not updating when project tempo changes Fixed note-off velocity (now sends 0, per MIDI spec) Restored free-running current_time (runs without transport) Fixed note duration default (now fraction of step, not raw samples) Added note_count overflow recovery Optimized note-off removal: swap-with-last instead of array shift Added custom GUI: horizontal sliders, color-coded section headers

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v2.0 Optimized DSP: smooth_coef in @init, per-sample rate smoothing, morph_wave early-outs, independent phase_r increment, note_div_values at safe base address, dead cache vars removed New "standard" GUI v1.0 Initial release

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v2.0 Slider labels changed to white for readability Added custom GUI with hand-drawn horizontal sliders and color-coded sections Removed default REAPER slider GUI v1.2 Added MIDI note on/off: triggers envelope, sets oscillator pitch Added MIDI pitch bend (+/- 2 semitones) Added S&H source selector: Noise / External / Oscillator Added custom GUI: horizontal sliders, color-coded section headers v1.1 Fixed ext_noinit (moved to options header) Fixed ring modulator - now runs in @sample Fixed VCA pin logic (unity when pin=0, envelope-controlled when pin>0) Fixed Osc->Filter Cutoff pin now applied in cutoff calculation Filter stability threshold raised from 2 to 10 Replaced inline 2*$pi with precomputed pi2 constant Removed default GUI. Removed filter state from @serialize

reapack.name: TapeEmu - Professional Tape Machine Emulation (AI Code).jsfx

version.author: citizenkeith - Claude AI
version.changelog: # TapeEmu 2.0 + Complete GUI overhaul with machine selector buttons + Added double-click to reset knobs to default values + Fixed head bump implementation (low shelf @ 90Hz) + Fixed Ampex ATR102 gain staging (was 1.7dB hot) + Added machine-specific high-frequency rolloff + Unity gain by default (0% input, 0dB output) + Conditional dimming of Noise and Head Bump knobs when presets active + Input/Output LED meters + 5 tape machine models: Studer A800, Ampex ATR102, Sony APR5000, Otari MTR90, Basic Tape

version.author: citizenkeith
version.changelog: v2.2 Fixed Noise and Head Bump not updating DSP when dragged (missing update_audio_vars() in @gfx) Fixed Noise slider: now scales noise for all tape machine presets (was Basic Tape only) Fixed Head Bump slider: now trims preset head bump value (was Basic Tape only) v2.1 Section boxes (I/O, Noise & Head Bump, Character) matching citizenkeith plugin family Knob order: Stereo Width and Wow & Flutter swapped in Character section Background and title styling updated to match Watkins/CocteauVerb Removed GUI meters — using REAPER default meter Added double-click to reset knobs, amber value readouts v2.0 Complete GUI overhaul with machine selector buttons Added double-click to reset knobs to default values Fixed head bump implementation (low shelf @ 90Hz) Fixed Ampex ATR102 gain staging (was 1.7dB hot) Added machine-specific high-frequency rolloff Unity gain by default (0% input, 0dB output) Conditional dimming of Noise and Head Bump knobs when presets active 5 tape machine models: Studer A800, Ampex ATR102, Sony APR5000, Otari MTR90, Basic Tape
